title: hieracium olivaceum subsp. chondroseum
intro: Hieracium olivaceum subsp. chondroseum is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, which is a type of flowering plant characterized by its yellow or orange daisy-like flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium olivaceum subsp. chondroseum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Hieracium olivaceum subsp. chondroseum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal tinctures or salves.
